# Blog Series Plan: The Agentic Readiness Shift

**Series Title:** The Agentic Architecture: Building for Autonomous Software Engineers
**Goal:** Shift the narrative from "AI as a Copilot" to "AI as a Team Member," highlighting how `@aiready` tools enable autonomous agents to navigate and modify complex codebases.

## Strategy & Themes
- **Agentic Friction:** Identifying what stops agents (Cline, Roo, Claude Code) from being effective.
- **Context ROI:** Quantifying the literal dollar cost of messy architecture in the agentic era.
- **Discoverability:** Moving beyond human readability to machine discoverability.
- **Platform Leverage:** Showcasing the Team/Dashboard features for managing "Agent-Ready" repositories.

## Roadmap

### Part 1: The Agentic Wall
- **Focus:** Why prompts that work on small repos fail on large ones.
- **Tool:** `@aiready/context-analyzer` (Navigation Tax).
- **Status:** [Drafting]

### Part 2: Zero-Shot Discovery & The GPS of Code
- **Focus:** Consistent naming and logic placement as "Navigation Signals" for agents.
- **Tool:** `@aiready/consistency`.
- **Status:** [Planned]

### Part 3: The Death of the "Black Box"
- **Focus:** Side-effect visibility and signal clarity.
- **Tool:** `@aiready/ai-signal-clarity`.
- **Status:** [Planned]

### Part 4: Scaling AI Teams (Agentic Swarms)
- **Focus:** Code review at scale and "Readiness Gates" in CI/CD.
- **Tool:** AIReady Platform (Team/Dashboard).
- **Status:** [Planned]

### Part 5: The Context ROI (The \$10k Refactor)
- **Focus:** Turning token waste into a business metric.
- **Tool:** AIReady Scoring Algorithm.
- **Status:** [Planned]

### Part 6: Micro-Context Architecture
- **Focus:** Repo structure for the 1M+ token era.
- **Tool:** `@aiready/visualizer`.
- **Status:** [Planned]
